predicate_mappings.coordinator_assigned: {} is assigned as the coordinator for {}
predicate_mappings.notification_sent: a notification has been sent for the discharge case {}
predicate_mappings.home_health_available: the home health agency {} is available
predicate_mappings.coordinator_eligible: the discharge case {} is eligible for the care coordinator {}
predicate_mappings.destination_eligible: the discharge case {} is eligible for the discharge destination {}
predicate_mappings.transport_eligible: the discharge case {} is eligible for transport by the unit {}
predicate_mappings.specialty_eligible: the discharge case {} is eligible for the specialty service {}
predicate_mappings.home_health_eligible: the discharge case {} is eligible for the home health agency {}
predicate_mappings.pharmacy_order_linked: the pharmacy order {} is linked to the discharge case {}
predicate_mappings.payer_authorization_linked: the payer authorization {} is linked to the discharge case {}
predicate_mappings.oversight_assigned: the oversight role type {} is assigned to the discharge case {}
predicate_mappings.clinician_assigned_to_record: the clinician approver {} is assigned to the discharge case record {}

preconditions: I can only open a discharge case A if it is not the case that A is an active case and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open a discharge case A, it is the case that A is an active case

assign_care_coordinator.description: assign a care coordinator B to a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only assign a care coordinator B to a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the care coordinator B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for the care coordinator B
I can only assign a care coordinator B to a discharge case A if it is not the case that A has an assignment flag
effects: Once I assign a care coordinator B to a discharge case A, it is the case that B is assigned as the coordinator for A and A has an assignment flag
Once I assign a care coordinator B to a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the care coordinator B is available

unassign_care_coordinator.description: unassign a care coordinator B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only unassign a care coordinator B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is assigned as the coordinator for A
I can only unassign a care coordinator B from a discharge case A if it is not the case that A has clinical clearance and it is not the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff
effects: Once I unassign a care coordinator B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the care coordinator B is available

Once I unassign a care coordinator B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as the coordinator for A and it is not the case anymore that A has an assignment flag and it is not the case anymore that A has a service engaged and it is not the case anymore that the documentation for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A is pending follow up and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for final checks and it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A

provision_equipment.description: provision an assistive equipment B to a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only provision an assistive equipment B to a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the assistive equipment B is available
effects: Once I provision an assistive equipment B to a discharge case A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I provision an assistive equipment B to a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the assistive equipment B is available

release_equipment.description: release an assistive equipment B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only release an assistive equipment B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release an assistive equipment B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the assistive equipment B is available
Once I release an assistive equipment B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

confirm_equipment_delivery.description: confirm delivery of an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only confirm delivery of an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and A has an assignment flag and B is allocated to A
I can only confirm delivery of an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A if it is not the case that A has a service engaged
effects: Once I confirm delivery of an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A, it is the case that A has a service engaged

engage_external_vendor.description: engage an external vendor B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only engage an external vendor B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and A has an assignment flag and the external vendor B is available
I can only engage an external vendor B for a discharge case A if it is not the case that A has a service engaged
effects: Once I engage an external vendor B for a discharge case A, it is the case that A has a service engaged and A is pending follow up
Once I engage an external vendor B for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the external vendor B is available

record_vendor_documentation.description: record documentation for a discharge case A using an assistive equipment B and a document resource C
preconditions: I can only record documentation for a discharge case A using an assistive equipment B and a document resource C if it is the case that A has a service engaged and A has an assignment flag and B is allocated to A and the document resource C is available
I can only record documentation for a discharge case A using an assistive equipment B and a document resource C if it is not the case that the documentation for A is complete
effects: Once I record documentation for a discharge case A using an assistive equipment B and a document resource C, it is the case that the documentation for A is complete
Once I record documentation for a discharge case A using an assistive equipment B and a document resource C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending follow up

clinician_validate_service.description: clinician a clinician B validates service for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only clinician a clinician B validates service for a discharge case A if it is the case that A has an assignment flag and B has approved the discharge case A
I can only clinician a clinician B validates service for a discharge case A if it is not the case that the documentation for A is complete
effects: Once I clinician a clinician B validates service for a discharge case A, it is the case that the documentation for A is complete
Once I clinician a clinician B validates service for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that A is pending follow up

reserve_transport.description: reserve a transport unit B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a transport unit B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the transport unit B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for transport by the unit B
effects: Once I reserve a transport unit B for a discharge case A, it is the case that B is allocated for A
Once I reserve a transport unit B for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the transport unit B is available

release_transport.description: release a transport unit B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only release a transport unit B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is allocated for A
effects: Once I release a transport unit B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the transport unit B is available
Once I release a transport unit B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated for A

reserve_specialty_service.description: reserve a specialty service B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialty service B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the specialty service B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for the specialty service B
effects: Once I reserve a specialty service B for a discharge case A, it is the case that B is allocated for A
Once I reserve a specialty service B for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the specialty service B is available

release_specialty_service.description: release a specialty service B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only release a specialty service B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is allocated for A
effects: Once I release a specialty service B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the specialty service B is available
Once I release a specialty service B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated for A

reserve_home_health.description: reserve a home health agency B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a home health agency B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the home health agency B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for the home health agency B
effects: Once I reserve a home health agency B for a discharge case A, it is the case that B is allocated for A
Once I reserve a home health agency B for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the home health agency B is available

release_home_health.description: release a home health agency B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only release a home health agency B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is allocated for A
effects: Once I release a home health agency B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the home health agency B is available
Once I release a home health agency B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated for A

request_payer_authorization.description: request a payer authorization B for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only request a payer authorization B for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an active case and the payer authorization B is available and the payer authorization B is linked to the discharge case A
effects: Once I request a payer authorization B for a discharge case A, it is the case that B is allocated for A
Once I request a payer authorization B for a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that the payer authorization B is available

release_payer_authorization.description: release a payer authorization B from a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only release a payer authorization B from a discharge case A if it is the case that B is allocated for A
effects: Once I release a payer authorization B from a discharge case A, it is the case that the payer authorization B is available
Once I release a payer authorization B from a discharge case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated for A

obtain_clinical_clearance_and_schedule.description: obtain clinical clearance and schedule a discharge case A for a discharge destination B using a transport unit C and a specialty service D
preconditions: I can only obtain clinical clearance and schedule a discharge case A for a discharge destination B using a transport unit C and a specialty service D if it is the case that A has an assignment flag and C is allocated for A and D is allocated for A and the discharge destination B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for the discharge destination B

I can only obtain clinical clearance and schedule a discharge case A for a discharge destination B using a transport unit C and a specialty service D if it is not the case that A has clinical clearance
effects: Once I obtain clinical clearance and schedule a discharge case A for a discharge destination B using a transport unit C and a specialty service D, it is the case that B is scheduled for A and A has clinical clearance

Once I obtain clinical clearance and schedule a discharge case A for a discharge destination B using a transport unit C and a specialty service D, it is not the case anymore that the discharge destination B is available

engage_specialty_and_pharmacy.description: engage a specialty and pharmacy}} for a discharge case A with a discharge destination B, a home health agency C, and a pharmacy order D
preconditions: I can only engage a specialty and pharmacy}} for a discharge case A with a discharge destination B, a home health agency C, and a pharmacy order D if it is the case that A has an assignment flag and C is allocated for A and the pharmacy order D is available and the discharge destination B is available and the discharge case A is eligible for the discharge destination B and the pharmacy order D is linked to the discharge case A
I can only engage a specialty and pharmacy}} for a discharge case A with a discharge destination B, a home health agency C, and a pharmacy order D if it is not the case that A has clinical clearance
effects: Once I engage a specialty and pharmacy}} for a discharge case A with a discharge destination B, a home health agency C, and a pharmacy order D, it is the case that B is scheduled for A and A has clinical clearance and a follow up is required for A and A is pending follow up

Once I engage a specialty and pharmacy}} for a discharge case A with a discharge destination B, a home health agency C, and a pharmacy order D, it is not the case anymore that the discharge destination B is available and it is not the case anymore that the pharmacy order D is available

finalize_destination_placement_checks.description: finalize destination placement checks for a discharge case A using a transport unit B and a specialty service C
preconditions: I can only finalize destination placement checks for a discharge case A using a transport unit B and a specialty service C if it is the case that A has clinical clearance and a follow up is required for A and B is allocated for A and C is allocated for A
effects: Once I finalize destination placement checks for a discharge case A using a transport unit B and a specialty service C, it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A and it is not the case anymore that A is pending follow up

execute_multidisciplinary_signoff_multid.description: execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B, a specialty service C, and a multidisciplinary reviewer D
preconditions: I can only execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B, a specialty service C, and a multidisciplinary reviewer D if it is the case that the documentation for A is complete and A has clinical clearance and B is allocated for A and C is allocated for A and the oversight role type D is assigned to the discharge case A

I can only execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B, a specialty service C, and a multidisciplinary reviewer D if it is not the case that A is pending follow up and it is not the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff
effects: Once I execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B, a specialty service C, and a multidisciplinary reviewer D, it is the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff

execute_multidisciplinary_signoff_author.description: execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a home health agency B, a payer authorization C, and an authorization reviewer D
preconditions: I can only execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a home health agency B, a payer authorization C, and an authorization reviewer D if it is the case that the documentation for A is complete and A has clinical clearance and B is allocated for A and C is allocated for A and the oversight role type D is assigned to the discharge case A

I can only execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a home health agency B, a payer authorization C, and an authorization reviewer D if it is not the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff
effects: Once I execute multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a home health agency B, a payer authorization C, and an authorization reviewer D, it is the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff and A is pending follow up

complete_multidisciplinary_signoff.description: complete multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B and a specialty service C
preconditions: I can only complete multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B and a specialty service C if it is the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff and A is pending follow up and B is allocated for A and C is allocated for A
effects: Once I complete multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B and a specialty service C, it is the case that A is ready for final checks

Once I complete multidisciplinary signoff for a discharge case A with a transport unit B and a specialty service C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending follow up and it is not the case anymore that the documentation for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that a follow up is required for A

revalidate_equipment_after_signoff.description: revalidate an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A using a document resource C after signoff
preconditions: I can only revalidate an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A using a document resource C after signoff if it is the case that A is ready for final checks and A has multidisciplinary signoff and A has an assignment flag and B is allocated to A and the document resource C is available
I can only revalidate an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A using a document resource C after signoff if it is not the case that the documentation for A is complete
effects: Once I revalidate an assistive equipment B for a discharge case A using a document resource C after signoff, it is the case that the documentation for A is complete

record_patient_education.description: record patient education for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B
preconditions: I can only record patient education for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B if it is the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff and the documentation for A is complete and B is allocated to A
I can only record patient education for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B if it is not the case that A is pending follow up and it is not the case that A has completed education
effects: Once I record patient education for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B, it is the case that A has completed education

record_vendor_education.description: record vendor education for a discharge case A with an external vendor B
preconditions: I can only record vendor education for a discharge case A with an external vendor B if it is the case that A has multidisciplinary signoff and the documentation for A is complete and the external vendor B is available
I can only record vendor education for a discharge case A with an external vendor B if it is not the case that A is pending follow up and it is not the case that A has completed education
effects: Once I record vendor education for a discharge case A with an external vendor B, it is the case that A has completed education
Once I record vendor education for a discharge case A with an external vendor B, it is not the case anymore that the external vendor B is available

request_final_transport_approval.description: request final transport approval for a discharge case A from a clinician B
preconditions: I can only request final transport approval for a discharge case A from a clinician B if it is the case that A has completed education and the clinician approver B is available and B is eligible for A
effects: Once I request final transport approval for a discharge case A from a clinician B, it is the case that the clinician approver B is assigned to the discharge case record A
Once I request final transport approval for a discharge case A from a clinician B, it is not the case anymore that the clinician approver B is available

provision_clinician_approval_for_transfe.description: provision clinician approval for transfer of an observation record variant A to an inpatient record variant B by a clinician C
preconditions: I can only provision clinician approval for transfer of an observation record variant A to an inpatient record variant B by a clinician C if it is the case that A is an active case and A is an observation record variant and C is the assigned clinician for A and the clinician approver C is assigned to the discharge case record B

I can only provision clinician approval for transfer of an observation record variant A to an inpatient record variant B by a clinician C if it is not the case that C has approved the discharge case A
effects: Once I provision clinician approval for transfer of an observation record variant A to an inpatient record variant B by a clinician C, it is the case that C has approved the discharge case A

record_discharge_notification.description: record discharge notification for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B using a document resource C
preconditions: I can only record discharge notification for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B using a document resource C if it is the case that A is an active case and A is an observation record variant and the documentation for A is complete and A has completed education and B is allocated to A and the document resource C is available

I can only record discharge notification for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B using a document resource C if it is not the case that a notification has been sent for the discharge case A
effects: Once I record discharge notification for a discharge case A with an assistive equipment B using a document resource C, it is the case that a notification has been sent for the discharge case A

close_case_final_checks_inpatient.description: close case with final checks for inpatient a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only close case with final checks for inpatient a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an inpatient record variant and A is an active case and A has an assignment flag and A has clinical clearance and A has multidisciplinary signoff and A has completed education and the documentation for A is complete
I can only close case with final checks for inpatient a discharge case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with final checks for inpatient a discharge case A, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_final_checks_with_approver.description: close case with final checks and approver for a discharge case A with a clinician B
preconditions: I can only close case with final checks and approver for a discharge case A with a clinician B if it is the case that A is an observation record variant and A is an active case and A has an assignment flag and A has clinical clearance and A has multidisciplinary signoff and A has completed education and the documentation for A is complete and B has approved the discharge case A
I can only close case with final checks and approver for a discharge case A with a clinician B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with final checks and approver for a discharge case A with a clinician B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_final_checks_observation.description: close case with final checks for observation for a discharge case A
preconditions: I can only close case with final checks for observation for a discharge case A if it is the case that A is an observation record variant and A is an active case and A has an assignment flag and A has clinical clearance and A has multidisciplinary signoff and A has completed education and the documentation for A is complete and a notification has been sent for the discharge case A
I can only close case with final checks for observation for a discharge case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with final checks for observation for a discharge case A, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_care_coordinator: assign care coordinator {?care_coordinator} to discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.unassign_care_coordinator: unassign care coordinator {?care_coordinator} from discharge case {?discharge_case}

action_nl_templates.release_equipment: release assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment} from discharge case {?discharge_case}

action_nl_templates.record_vendor_documentation: record documentation for discharge case {?discharge_case} using assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment} and document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates.clinician_validate_service: clinician clinician {?clinician_approver} validates service for discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_transport: reserve transport unit {?transport_unit} for discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.release_transport: release transport unit {?transport_unit} from discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_specialty_service: reserve specialty service {?specialty_service} for discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.release_specialty_service: release specialty service {?specialty_service} from discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_home_health: reserve home health agency {?home_health_agency} for discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.release_home_health: release home health agency {?home_health_agency} from discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.request_payer_authorization: request payer authorization {?payer_authorization} for discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payer_authorization: release payer authorization {?payer_authorization} from discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.obtain_clinical_clearance_and_schedule: obtain clinical clearance and schedule discharge case {?discharge_case} for discharge destination {?discharge_destination} using transport unit {?transport_unit} and specialty service {?specialty_service}
action_nl_templates.engage_specialty_and_pharmacy: engage specialty and pharmacy} for discharge case {?discharge_case} with discharge destination {?discharge_destination}, home health agency {?home_health_agency}, and pharmacy order {?pharmacy_order}
action_nl_templates.finalize_destination_placement_checks: finalize destination placement checks for discharge case {?discharge_case} using transport unit {?transport_unit} and specialty service {?specialty_service}
action_nl_templates.execute_multidisciplinary_signoff_multid: execute multidisciplinary signoff for discharge case {?discharge_case} with transport unit {?transport_unit}, specialty service {?specialty_service}, and multidisciplinary reviewer {?care_team_member_typea}
action_nl_templates.execute_multidisciplinary_signoff_author: execute multidisciplinary signoff for discharge case {?discharge_case} with home health agency {?home_health_agency}, payer authorization {?payer_authorization}, and authorization reviewer {?care_team_member_typeb}
action_nl_templates.complete_multidisciplinary_signoff: complete multidisciplinary signoff for discharge case {?discharge_case} with transport unit {?transport_unit} and specialty service {?specialty_service}
action_nl_templates.revalidate_equipment_after_signoff: revalidate assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment} for discharge case {?discharge_case} using document resource {?document_resource} after signoff
action_nl_templates.record_patient_education: record patient education for discharge case {?discharge_case} with assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment}
action_nl_templates.record_vendor_education: record vendor education for discharge case {?discharge_case} with external vendor {?external_vendor}
action_nl_templates.request_final_transport_approval: request final transport approval for discharge case {?discharge_case} from clinician {?clinician_approver}
action_nl_templates.provision_clinician_approval_for_transfe: provision clinician approval for transfer of observation record variant {?observation_record_variant} to inpatient record variant {?inpatient_record_variant} by clinician {?clinician_approver}
action_nl_templates.record_discharge_notification: record discharge notification for discharge case {?discharge_case} with assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment} using document resource {?document_resource}
action_nl_templates.close_case_final_checks_inpatient: close case with final checks for inpatient discharge case {?discharge_case}
action_nl_templates.close_case_final_checks_with_approver: close case with final checks and approver for discharge case {?discharge_case} with clinician {?clinician_approver}
action_nl_templates.close_case_final_checks_observation: close case with final checks for observation for discharge case {?discharge_case}

predicate_nl_templates.notification_sent: a notification has been sent for the discharge case {?discharge_case}
predicate_nl_templates.home_health_available: the home health agency {?home_health_agency} is available

predicate_nl_templates.destination_eligible: the discharge case {?discharge_case} is eligible for the discharge destination {?discharge_destination}
predicate_nl_templates.transport_eligible: the discharge case {?discharge_case} is eligible for transport by the unit {?transport_unit}
predicate_nl_templates.specialty_eligible: the discharge case {?discharge_case} is eligible for the specialty service {?specialty_service}
predicate_nl_templates.home_health_eligible: the discharge case {?discharge_case} is eligible for the home health agency {?home_health_agency}

action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_care_coordinator: unassign a care coordinator {?care_coordinator} from a discharge case {?discharge_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_equipment: release an assistive equipment {?assistive_equipment} from a discharge case {?discharge_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a discharge case or a care coordinator or a discharge destination or a specialty service or a transport unit or a home health agency or a assistive equipment or a external vendor or a clinician or a document resource or a pharmacy order or a payer authorization or a oversight role type is also a object
Everything that is a multidisciplinary reviewer or a authorization reviewer is also a oversight role type
Everything that is a inpatient record variant or a observation record variant is also a discharge case
